summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VMS360 PDF Export feature. All backend API tests passed (12/12). Frontend UI verified - PDF Rapor button visible and clickable on heatmap page. Logo visible on both login page and sidebar.
passed_tests: PDF export endpoint exists and accepts POST requests
PDF export returns valid base64 encoded PDF content
PDF export returns proper filename ending with .pdf
PDF filename contains store name (Forum Kadikoy)
PDF filename contains floor name (AVM Ana Koridor)
PDF export works with canvas image included
Logo URL is accessible and returns image content
Logo visible in sidebar after login
PDF Rapor button visible on heatmap page
PDF Rapor button is clickable and not disabled
Heatmap visualization displays correctly with zones
critical_code_review_comments: PDF export implementation uses WeasyPrint correctly for HTML to PDF conversion
PDF includes all required elements: logo, store name, floor name, date range, statistics, camera list
Canvas image from frontend is properly embedded in PDF when provided
Error handling returns appropriate 404 for invalid store/floor IDs
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - Store: Forum Kadikoy (16d18512-6191-4f60-8425-595d9da0ec0f), Floor: AVM Ana Koridor (c713f669-075f-4e06-b252-9b5fd57ac1eb)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF Export feature fully tested and working. Backend API at /api/heatmap/export/pdf generates PDF with WeasyPrint. Frontend exportToPDF function in HeatmapPage.jsx sends canvas image to backend and downloads resulting PDF. Logo URL: https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_retail-footfall/artifacts/bjfv2q4b_image.png is used in login page, sidebar, and PDF reports.

pdf_content.camera_list: List of cameras on the floor

ui_elements.pdf_rapor_button: Visible in heatmap page header when floor is selected
ui_elements.button_state: Enabled when heatmap data is loaded
